headline: Keysight Showcases Solutions Accelerating AI Infrastructure at OFC 2026
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., March 09, 2026--Keysight will demonstrate how it accelerates AI infrastructure development with end-to-end visibility and validation.

headline: Keysight Receives 2026 GTI Innovative Technology Breakthrough Award for AI and 5G-Advanced Convergence
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., March 09, 2026--The award honors Keysight’s AI Device Testbed, built to validate AI-enabled devices in real-world 5G-Advanced conditions in the lab.
